subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! Hearken unto the Call of 'Alí from the Realm of the Most Exalted, then unto the Call of Muhammad from the Lote-Tree of the Utmost Bound, then unto the Call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا احمد اسمع ندآء علی من جبروت الاعلی ثم ندآء محمد عن سدره المنتهی ثم ندآء
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action, @power of the Manifestation of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @chastisement and requital, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
